payload.answer: The repeated Slack event appears to be a duplicate delivery of the same fact, not a new memory update.
repair_options: Treat the second Slack delivery as a duplicate and do not add another copy.
Ask for confirmation before recording anything from this event.
If the first delivery was not actually saved, record the fact once: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
